pages.title: Crypt Overview Map
pages.body:
A rough sketch of the sunken crypt complex. [[Entry Hall]] leads to the [[False Antechamber]].

*Map art placeholder — attach a battle map asset later.*

pages.title: Upper Crypt Sketch
pages.body: Annotated corridors linking [[Guardian Vault]] and [[Archivist's Niche]].

pages.title: The Archivist
pages.body: A dust-shrouded scholar who catalogued expedition gear before the delving turned sour. Mentions [[False Antechamber]] and warns about [[Spike Pit]].

pages.title: Guardian Construct
pages.body: A ward-bound automaton guarding the [[Guardian Vault]]. Responds to the phrase carved on [[Entry Hall]] — or doesn't.

pages.title: Herald of Ash
pages.body: A spectral voice echoing from [[False Antechamber]]. Offers riddles, never answers.

pages.title: The Sunken Delve
pages.body: Recover the Archivist's ledger from the crypt. First casualties reported near [[Spike Pit]].

pages.title: Entry Hall
pages.body: Cracked mosaic floor. Inscription: *Only the wary pass.* Leads to [[False Antechamber]] and a side passage to [[Archivist's Niche]].

pages.title: False Antechamber
pages.body: Three identical doors. One is real. [[Herald of Ash]] whispers from the ceiling. Wrong choice → [[Spike Pit]].

pages.title: Spike Pit
pages.body: A concealed drop lined with rusted spikes. Climbing out requires rope or magic. Linked from [[False Antechamber]].

pages.title: Guardian Vault
pages.body: [[Guardian Construct]] stands before a sealed reliquary. Beyond lies [[Dust Chapel]].

pages.title: Dust Chapel
pages.body: Collapsed altar. Faint chronology marks on the walls reference [[Expedition Begins]].

pages.title: Archivist's Niche
pages.body: Shelves of rotted journals. [[The Archivist]] left notes pointing to [[Guardian Vault]].

pages.title: Sealed Inner Door
pages.body: A door with no handle. Stub link to [[Lost Treasury]] — never fully mapped.

pages.title: Abandoned Survey Notes
pages.body: TODO: finish mapping the lower level.

pages.title: Expedition Log (fragment)
pages.body: Day 3 — found the [[Spike Pitt]] entrance. (typo link intentional)

calendarEvents.title: Expedition Begins
calendarEvents.description: The delving company enters the crypt.

calendarEvents.title: First Casualties Reported
calendarEvents.description: Scouts fail to return from the antechamber.

calendarEvents.title: Ledger Recovery Attempt
calendarEvents.description: Survivors push toward the Guardian Vault.

eventPages.title: Expedition Begins
eventPages.body: The company descends into the crypt. See [[Entry Hall]].

eventPages.title: First Casualties Reported
eventPages.body: Word reaches camp that scouts vanished near [[False Antechamber]].
